subject: fix(pwa): trigger update check on refresh button press
body:
The refresh button only refetched chat data without checking for PWA
updates. Installed PWA users had no way to manually detect new deploys
except waiting for the hourly automatic check or closing/reopening the
app. Now the refresh button also calls checkForUpdates() which checks
both the service worker and version.json for new versions.

Also removed the standalone gate from the manual checkForUpdates() call
since the render condition (isInstalled && hasUpdate) already prevents
showing the update button to non-PWA browser users.

Tags: pwa, bugfix, update-detection
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-updates
Semver: patch
